summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Dashboard Sales Resource filter now correctly includes all user roles (CEO, Director, Vice President, System Admin). Backend API tests (9/9) and Frontend UI tests all passed. Lead counts match expected values: Surya Yadavalli (CEO) = 21 leads, System Admin = 15 leads, Priya Menon = 1 lead, Rahul Sharma = 1 lead.

issues: Weather API returning 502 - rate limited (non-blocking issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Dashboard Sales Resource filter bug has been fixed and verified. The salesRoles array in Dashboard.js fetchSalesTeam() now includes 'CEO', 'Director', 'Vice President', 'System Admin' in addition to sales roles. Backend filtering works correctly - filter by sales_resource parameter returns accurate lead counts.

Backend API Tests (9 passed).GET /api/users - all roles present: PASS - Returns users with CEO, Director, Vice President, System Admin roles
Backend API Tests (9 passed).GET /api/users - CEO Surya exists: PASS - Surya Yadavalli (CEO) found in users
Backend API Tests (9 passed).GET /api/users - System Admin exists: PASS - System Admin found in users

Frontend UI Tests.Login as CEO: PASS - Logged in as Surya Yadavalli
Frontend UI Tests.Sales Resource dropdown options: PASS - Contains 23 options including CEO, Director, System Admin
Frontend UI Tests.Status distribution display: PASS - Correctly shows lead breakdown by status

fix_verification.change_description: Added 'CEO', 'Director', 'Vice President', 'System Admin' to salesRoles array in fetchSalesTeam()
